creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
After a panic, the system says

	Automatic reboot in 15 seconds, press any key to abort

	but keypress has no effect, it reboots anyway, making it hard to
	recover the panic message.

	I think this feature worked before, but I'm not sure whether it
	worked after I switched into pcvt.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Get a panic and see if you can stop the system from rebooting.
